# Codex Feature Template

## Goal
Describe the feature and the user workflow it enables.

## Scope
List allowed apps, packages, and files. Name explicit exclusions.

## Tasks
- Inspect existing patterns.
- Implement the smallest complete slice.
- Add or update focused verification.

## Fix Rules
- Preserve current behavior outside the feature.
- Prefer existing shared UI, domain, and ICF helpers.
- Avoid unrelated cleanup.

## Acceptance Tests
- List expected UI or data outcomes.
- Include syntax/build checks.

## Output Required
## What Changed
## Files Added
## Files Modified
## Tests Run
## Known Risks
